title: 3 Sustainable Fashion Stocks to Buy Now
text: The fashion industry faces many sustainability challenges, and it has been financially sucker-punched by COVID lockdowns in China and surging inflation. So investors with environmental, social and corporate governance issues in mind face a host of hurdles when it comes to trying on fashion stocks.

title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation: A Great Business That's Nearing Fair Value
text: Deckers Outdoor Corporation has seen strong topline growth recently, but profitability has been somewhat mixed. Shares have also risen significantly, with the easy money for investors having already been made.

title: Stock Splits: 7 Companies That Should Follow Tesla's Lead
text: The best known of the upcoming stock splits is Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA ). It will split its stock today, Aug. 24, after the close of trading.

title: Teva® Announces the Arrival of its Latest Collection for Fall 2022
text: GOLETA, Calif. , Aug. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Teva ®, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), announces the arrival of its latest collection for Fall 2022, inviting Teva fans to adventure further into the modern outdoors.

title: New Sanuk® and Surfrider Foundation Capsule Collection Debuts Today
text: Premium, Eco-Conscious Footwear Collab & Partnership To Help Protect Our Happy Places GOLETA, Calif. , Aug. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Sanuk, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), has joined forces with longstanding partner the Surfrider Foundation, a nonprofit environmental organization dedicated to the protection and enjoyment of our ocean, waves and beaches, once again for a limited-edition ocean-inspired footwear collection.
